tool_descriptions.generate_otp:
generate_otp(user_input={user_input}) -> str
Purpose: Generate and send an OTP using the user-provided identifier (10 digit indian WhatsApp number only without contry code/app_id). nInput variables:
  - user_input: Phone number or app_id used to send the OTP
 
Returns:
 status,phone_number,app_id,message
Example output:
  status,phone_number,app_id,message\r\n  OTP Sent,9657052655,DIRECT,OTP generated Successfully\r\n
tool_descriptions.validate_otp:
validate_otp(otp={otp}) -> str
Purpose: Validate the OTP for the current session and finalize authentication.
Input variables:
  - otp: The OTP entered by the user.Returns:
  - CSV string with columns: status,message,app_id,user_details.id,user_details.phone_number,user_details.firstname,user_details.lastname
Example output:
  status,message,app_id,user_details.id,user_details.phone_number,user_details.firstname,user_details.lastname\r\n  success,Logged in.,28070027,7995d0b5-e5f9-5de8-9ddd-62e7a6458de6,9000000001,Mock,User\r\n
tool_descriptions.is_logged_in:
is_logged_in() -> dict
Purpose: Check if the current session is authenticated.
Input variables:
  - (none)Returns:
  - Dict: {"logged_in": <bool>}
Example output:
  {"logged_in": true}
tool_descriptions.dashboard_home:
dashboard_home() -> str
Purpose: Fetch the dashboard home summary for the authenticated user/session.
Input variables:
  - (none)Returns:
  - Structured text payload (YAML-ish) containing values like:
    agency_flag: "true"
    loans[...] with loan_id|app_id|loan_number|status|product_code
    all_loans[...] with same fields
tool_descriptions.loan_details:
loan_details() -> str
Purpose: Fetch detailed loan information for the current authenticated session.
Input variables:
  - (none)Returns:
  - Structured text payload (YAML-ish) including:
    loan_summary (amounts, EMI stats, overdue, asset)
    loan_details (status, number, ROI, tenure, disbursal/maturity dates)
    payment_summary (paid/remaining, next EMI, ensure balance date)
    overdue breakdown (EMI/LPP/BCC/others) and references
tool_descriptions.foreclosure_details:
foreclosure_details() -> str
Purpose: Fetch foreclosure/closure eligibility and NOC-related status for the current loan.
Input variables:
  - (none)Returns:
  - Structured text payload (YAML-ish) including:
    app_id, loan_status, is_noc_available, rejection_reason,
    closure_date, noc_generated_date, email_sent_to, status_code
tool_descriptions.overdue_details:
overdue_details() -> str
Purpose: Fetch overdue summary for the current loan (total overdue + breakup + last payment).
Input variables:
  - (none)Returns:
  - Structured text payload (YAML-ish) including:
    total_overdue_amount, days_past_due, bucket,
    breakup (emi_overdue_amount, lpp_charges, bounce_charges, other_charges),
    last_payment_details (amount, date, status)
tool_descriptions.noc_details:
noc_details() -> str
Purpose: Fetch NOC (No Objection Certificate) availability details for the current loan.
Input variables:
  - (none)Returns:
  - Structured text payload (YAML-ish) including:
    app_id, loan_status, is_noc_available, rejection_reason,
    closure_date, noc_generated_date, email_sent_to
tool_descriptions.repayment_schedule:
repayment_schedule() -> str
Purpose: Fetch the full repayment schedule for the current loan.
Input variables:
  - (none)Returns:
  - Structured text payload (YAML-ish) including:
    schedule_summary (loan_amount, ROI, tenure, EMI, totals)
    installments list with fields:
      installment_no, due_date, opening_principal, principal_component,
      interest_component, installment_amount, closing_principal, status, payment_date
    status_code
tool_descriptions.download_welcome_letter:
download_welcome_letter() -> str
Purpose: Generate/fetch the Welcome Letter document download details for the authenticated user.
Input variables:
  - (none)Returns:
  - Structured text payload (YAML-ish) including:
    document_type, download_url, password_protection, password_hint, status_code
Example output:
  document_type: Welcome Letter
  download_url: "{download_url}"
  password_protection: Enabled
  password_hint: First 4 letters of your name + DDMM of your birth date (e.g. SUDH0101)
  status_code: 200
tool_descriptions.download_soa:
download_soa(start_date={start_date}, end_date={end_date}) -> str
Purpose: Generate/fetch a Statement of Account (SOA) document for a given date range.
Input variables:
  - start_date: Start of period (DD/MM/YYYY).
  - end_date: End of period (DD/MM/YYYY).Returns:
  - Structured text payload (YAML-ish) including:
    document_type, download_url, password_protection, password_hint,
    period, generated_on, status_code
Example output:
  document_type: Statement of Account
  download_url: "{download_url}"
  password_protection: Enabled
  password_hint: First 4 letters of your name + DDMM of your birth date (e.g. SUDH0101)
  period: {start_date} to {end_date}
  generated_on: {generated_on}
  status_code: 200
